level_signals: Compensation range $216K-$252K base suggests senior-level IC
Portfolio-level program management responsibility across capital builds

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong project and program management capabilities
Strong knowledge of the architectural design process (schematic design, design development, construction documents)
Strong knowledge of commercial real estate construction processes
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Vendor management experience (Vendor vetting, RFP and bid response, performance management, handover)
Understanding of mechanical power, cooling systems and capacity planning
Ability to read construction and engineering plan drawings
PMP or equivalent project management certification

scope.surface: Technology Capital Builds — new office buildouts, remodels, industrial labs, datacenters, secured facilities; covering low voltage, ISP connectivity, network infrastructure, AV, physical security
primary_metrics_inferred: On-time delivery of capital build projects
Risk identification and mitigation across builds portfolio
core_responsibilities: Cross-functional coordination between internal teams, construction and related trades and other vendors/service providers
Manage the design, bid, implementation, commissioning and handover process for ISP connectivity, low voltage cabling and network infrastructure (MDF/IDF, MPOEs, inside/outside cabling plant, etc.)
Partner with the ITAV team during the design, bid, implementation, commissioning and handover process for audio-visual/video-conference systems
Partner with the Corporate Security team to implement supporting infrastructure and network integration for access control, surveillance systems and intrusion detection
Manage project schedules, status updates, executive communications for the builds portfolio
Develop drawing packages and specification narratives in support of project design and execution
Manage procurement and provide guidance to FP&A on budget and cost management
Identify, categorize, mitigate and monitor project delivery risks

green_flags: Clear, technically specific scope with well-defined deliverables
Concrete cross-functional partner list named in JD
Role sits at intersection of IT infrastructure and facilities — specialized and high-value at OpenAI scale
red_flags: No location specified — unclear if onsite is required for capital builds work (likely onsite given nature of role)
No years-of-experience requirement stated, making seniority expectations harder to assess
All requirements framed under 'you might thrive if you have' — hard vs soft classification is ambiguous throughout

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from compensation range and portfolio scope)
location.type (not stated; construction/facilities role likely requires onsite presence but JD does not specify)
ambiguities: All requirements appear under 'You might thrive in this role if you have:' phrasing which is softer than 'Required', yet these are core technical competencies expected for a capital builds PM. Treated as hard severity given functional necessity and specificity.
PMP 'or equivalent' makes the certification requirement ambiguous — treated as hard with accepts_equivalent_experience=true.
Location not stated anywhere in the JD body despite the role almost certainly requiring physical presence at build sites.
